content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND for autonomous agents) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for active learning agent long-term memory, where only surprising, unpredicted state transitions (the same signal that drives exploration) get preserved in the limited finite context window of SOTA 2024-2025 agents. This creates a self-organizing memory system that automatically retains high-information-content experiences aligned with the agent's ongoing active learning goals, without manual memory curation rules.
